artPrompt: A colossal sludge kaiju heaving its dripping bulk out of the poisoned reservoir, a glistening mountain of murky green ooze studded with mismatched eyes and bioluminescent veins, rusted pipes and crushed concrete sloughing off its flanks beneath a bruised stormy sky. The reservoir loves a warm day. The towering horror fills the wide landscape frame top to bottom, dwarfing the ruined plant. Wide 4:3 landscape, Gruul green and rust red, swelling toxic menace, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: It Is As Big As the Room Is Warm
text:
It Is As Big As the Room Is Warm's power and toughness are each equal to the current room temperature in degrees Fahrenheit divided by ten, rounded however the warmest player feels about it.
Feed (Whenever a player rolls one or more dice, flips one or more coins, or votes, put a sludge counter on this creature.)
For each sludge counter on it, the thermostat "reads one degree higher" for this card's purposes. Open a window at your own risk.
flavorText: Marine biologists hate it. HVAC technicians fear it. The reservoir loves a warm day.
